title: Slovakian Fish Tagine
description: A traditional Slovakian dish with a North African twist, combining fish and the warm, aromatic flavors of a tagine.

ingredients.name: Tagine spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: Complex sauce
ingredients.notes: See below for complex sauce recipe

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add fish pieces; cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add tagine spice mix, complex sauce, and pickled peppers; stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until fish is cooked through.
Complex sauce: Combine 1 cup fish broth, 1/4 cup heavy cream, and 2 tbsp Dijon mustard in a small saucepan.
Bring to a simmer over medium heat; cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
